_note: Placeholder wireframe manifest — GAPS.md flags the real graphic-novel content pipeline as undefined (no chapters, no art, no authoring convention yet). This gives the reader mechanic (chapter rail, panel pager, lock state, CTA into the next mission) something real to render against until real content lands. Swap image_slot labels for real art paths under content/ when it exists — no JS changes needed.

panels.caption: Alex has lived his whole life at the bottom of the mountain.
"I'm not climbing to leave Keel behind. I'm climbing to bring something better back."
The lights of Alpha go dark for the first time.
The market moved on. The mountain was left behind.
A local faction fills the vacuum. They call themselves the Brokers.
"I thought we needed better technology. We needed a better system."
Not every build works the first time.
Strong teams don't wait for perfect conditions.
Alone, we were broken. Together, we are reclaimed.
One filter helps one family. A network helps generations.
Alchemy: "You rebuilt one mountain. There are thousands."
Every community has its own mountain. The next Evokation isn't Alex's. It's yours.
